creator: freezr@disroot.org
text:
Dear Maintainer,

the very latest version of Thunderbird crashes at startup but it doesn't if started in "safe-mode"; however resetting the UI and disabling the addons permanently did not solve the issue, a fresh start did not solve the issue.

# PROCEDURE TO REPLICATE THE ISSUE
Open a terminal; digit thunderbird; enter.

# SYSTEM
```
FreeBSD nag09 13.0-RELEASE-p11 FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p11 #0: Tue Apr  5 18:54:35 UTC 2022     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64
```

TGL
